payload.description: Systemwide wood tie replacement program. 13,200 ties planned; 14,009 installed (106% of Goal - Complete). Includes Hempstead: Park 2 to Garden (121% complete) and Oyster Bay: East Williston to Locust (101% complete).

Systemwide concrete tie replacement program. 32,260 ties planned; 33,489 installed (104% of Goal). Includes Mainline: Queens to Carte Place (105% complete), Atlantic: Hall to Valley (120% complete), Hempstead: Bellerose to Park 2 (55% complete), Mainline: Divide 2 to Divide 3 (added location).

Systemwide continuous welded rail installation. 40,000 lineal ft. planned; 54,262 lineal ft. installed (136% of Goal). Includes Atlantic: Hall to Valley (120% complete), Hempstead: Bellerose to Park 2 (55% complete), Mainline: Queens to Carte Place (added location), Mainline: Divide 2 to Divide 3 (added location).
Systemwide field weld installation. 1,200 ea. Weld Planned; 1,351 ea. actual (112% of Goal).

Systemwide track surfacing program. 68 mi. planned; 95 mi. actual (140% of Goal). Includes Atlantic: Hall to Valley (110%), Hempstead: Park 2 to Garden (100%), Hempstead: Bellerose to Park 2 (60%), Mainline: Queens to Carle Place (123%), Oyster Bay: East Williston to Locust (100%), Other Locations Systemwide (179%).

Systemwide switch renewal program. 16 ea. planned; 12 ea. installed (75% of Goal). Includes West Side Yard (22%), Mainline: Divide 21W/21E (100%), Mainline: Divide 13W (100%), Mainline: Nassau 2 (100%), Mainline: Queens 221 Crossover (100%), Montauk: Jay 65 Sw. (100%), Hicksville Yard 1sw & 2sw (100%).

payload.description: State of Good Repair station projects across LIRR branches. Includes Montauk Branch (Sayville, Oakdale, Great River, Islip, Patchogue, Massapequa Park), Port Washington Branch (Mets/Willets, Bayside, Murray Hill, Plandome), Main Line Branch (Ronkonkoma), Hempstead (Bellerose), Atlantic (Rosedale), Far Rockaway (Gibson), Oyster Bay (Sea Cliff), Port Jefferson (Northport), plus IT Racks Installation at all 125 stations (100% complete) and Tactile Installation at 25 stations (46% complete).

Bridge State of Good Repair projects. Montauk Branch: Merrick Blvd bearing repairs (100%), Fresh Pond Road pedestrian bridge removal (10%), Dutch Kills Draw Bridge flag repairs (100%). Main Line Branch: 39th Ave and 57th Street flag repairs (50%), Ronkonkoma Knuckle Room Bridge flag repairs (0%). Bay Ridge: Cypress Ave bearing replacement (88%).

Flag repairs replacing deteriorated components of LIRR infrastructure on Main Line. Includes 69th St. Fish Ave, Hollis Station, Hicksville Viaduct, Raynor Avenue, Continental Ave, Union Hall Street North Bridge, Farmers Blvd. & Hollis Ave, Floral Park Station, Medford, Guy R. Brewer Center Bridge, Sulphur Boulevard, and other locations at various completion stages.

Flag repairs on Port Jefferson branch. Includes Woodbury Road MP 31.1 (100%), Hicksville Viaduct MP 25.1 (100%), Stony Brook Station Pedestrian Overpass MP 53.2 (100%), River Road Crossing MP 47.8 (100%), Smithtown Overpass MP 47.1 (80%), Huntington MP 34.7 (0%).

Flag repairs on Montauk Branch. Includes Lindenhurst Canopy #1 (100%), Skillman Avenue East (100%), Merrick Platform A (100%), Park Avenue (100%), Baldwin Viaduct (100%), Copiague Viaduct (100%), Carl Avenue South Bridge (100%), Sayville Pedestrian Overpass (100%), Copiague Staircase (0%), Richmond Hill Viaduct (0%).
